option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
option.value:
package com.example.aistudyassistance
data class Flashcard( val question: String, val answer: String )

option.name: updatedContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <LinearLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:background="@color/background" android:fitsSystemWindows="true" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="16dp">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginBottom="16dp" android:orientation="horizontal">
<ImageView android:id="@+id/ivBack" android:layout_width="24dp" android:layout_height="24dp" android:layout_gravity="center_vertical" android:layout_marginEnd="16dp" android:src="@drawable/ic_back" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvFlashcardTitle" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:text="Flashcards: Topic" android:textColor="@color/text_main" android:textSize="20sp" android:textStyle="bold" /> </LinearLayout>
<LinearLayout android:id="@+id/layoutFlashcardContent" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="0dp" android:layout_weight="1" android:orientation="vertical">
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvFlashcardProgress" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginBottom="8dp" android:text="Card 1 / 10" android:textColor="@color/text_secondary" android:textSize="16sp" />
<com.google.android.material.progressindicator.LinearProgressIndicator android:id="@+id/flashcardProgressBar" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginBottom="16dp" android:progress="10" app:indicatorColor="@color/primary" app:trackColor="@color/gray_light" />
<androidx.viewpager2.widget.ViewPager2 android:id="@+id/viewPagerFlashcards" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="0dp" android:layout_weight="1" android:clipToPadding="false" android:paddingTop="8dp" android:paddingBottom="8dp" />
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="12dp" android:orientation="horizontal">
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnFlashcardPrevious" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginEnd="8dp" android:layout_weight="1" android:text="Previous" app:cornerRadius="8dp" />
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnFlashcardFlip" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginHorizontal="4dp" android:layout_weight="1" android:text="Flip" app:cornerRadius="8dp" />
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnFlashcardNext" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginStart="8dp" android:layout_weight="1" android:text="Next" app:cornerRadius="8dp" /> </LinearLayout> </LinearLayout>
<LinearLayout android:id="@+id/layoutDeckCompleted" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="0dp" android:layout_weight="1" android:gravity="center" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="24dp" android:visibility="gone">
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="You’ve completed all flashcards " android:textColor="@color/text_main" android:textSize="22sp" android:textStyle="bold" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvCompletedCount" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="12dp" android:text="Total cards reviewed: 10" android:textColor="@color/text_secondary" android:textSize="16sp" />
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnRestartDeck" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="24dp" android:text="Restart" app:cornerRadius="8dp" />
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnBackHome" style="@style/Widget.Material3.Button.OutlinedButton" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="12dp" android:text="Back to Home" app:cornerRadius="8dp" /> </LinearLayout>
</LinearLayout>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <LinearLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:background="@color/background" android:fitsSystemWindows="true" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="16dp">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginBottom="16dp" android:orientation="horizontal">
<ImageView android:id="@+id/ivBack" android:layout_width="24dp" android:layout_height="24dp" android:layout_gravity="center_vertical" android:layout_marginEnd="16dp" android:src="@drawable/ic_back" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvFlashcardTitle" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:text="Flashcards: Topic" android:textColor="@color/text_main" android:textSize="20sp" android:textStyle="bold" /> </LinearLayout>
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvStudyModeLabel" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Study Mode" android:textColor="@color/text_main" android:textStyle="bold" android:layout_marginBottom="8dp" />
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButtonToggleGroup android:id="@+id/toggleStudyMode" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginBottom="8dp" app:singleSelection="true" app:selectionRequired="true">
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnModeQuickReview" style="@style/Widget.Material3.Button.OutlinedButton" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:text="Quick Review" />
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnModeActiveRecall" style="@style/Widget.Material3.Button.OutlinedButton" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:text="Active Recall" /> </com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButtonToggleGroup>
<LinearLayout android:id="@+id/layoutFlashcardContent" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="0dp" android:layout_weight="1" android:orientation="vertical">
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvCardTimer" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginBottom="6dp" android:text="⏱ 0s" android:textColor="@color/text_secondary" android:textSize="14sp" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvFlashcardProgress" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginBottom="8dp" android:text="Card 1 / 10" android:textColor="@color/text_secondary" android:textSize="16sp" />
<com.google.android.material.progressindicator.LinearProgressIndicator android:id="@+id/flashcardProgressBar" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginBottom="16dp" android:progress="10" app:indicatorColor="@color/primary" app:trackColor="@color/gray_light" />
<androidx.viewpager2.widget.ViewPager2 android:id="@+id/viewPagerFlashcards" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="0dp" android:layout_weight="1" android:clipToPadding="false" android:paddingTop="8dp" android:paddingBottom="8dp" />
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="12dp" android:orientation="horizontal">
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnFlashcardPrevious" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginEnd="8dp" android:layout_weight="1" android:text="Previous" app:cornerRadius="8dp" />
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnFlashcardFlip" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginHorizontal="4dp" android:layout_weight="1" android:text="Flip" app:cornerRadius="8dp" />
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnFlashcardNext" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginStart="8dp" android:layout_weight="1" android:text="Next" app:cornerRadius="8dp" /> </LinearLayout> </LinearLayout>
<LinearLayout android:id="@+id/layoutDeckCompleted" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="0dp" android:layout_weight="1" android:gravity="center" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="24dp" android:visibility="gone">
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="You’ve completed all flashcards " android:textColor="@color/text_main" android:textSize="22sp" android:textStyle="bold" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvCompletedCount" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="12dp" android:text="Total Cards: 10" android:textColor="@color/text_secondary" android:textSize="16sp" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvCompletedDifficulty" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="8dp" android:text="Easy: 0 | Medium: 0 | Hard: 0" android:textColor="@color/text_secondary" android:textSize="16sp" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvCompletedAvgTime" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="8dp" android:text="Avg Time: 0 sec" android:textColor="@color/text_secondary" android:textSize="16sp" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvCompletedUnattempted" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="8dp" android:text="Unattempted Cards: 0" android:textColor="@color/text_secondary" android:textSize="16sp" />
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnRestartDeck" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="24dp" android:text="Restart" app:cornerRadius="8dp" />
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnBackHome" style="@style/Widget.Material3.Button.OutlinedButton" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="12dp" android:text="Back to Home" app:cornerRadius="8dp" />
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnReviewHardCards" style="@style/Widget.Material3.Button.OutlinedButton" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="12dp" android:text="Review Hard Cards" app:cornerRadius="8dp" />
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnReviewUnattemptedCards" style="@style/Widget.Material3.Button.OutlinedButton" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="12dp" android:text="Review Unattempted Cards" app:cornerRadius="8dp" /> </LinearLayout>
</LinearLayout>

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <LinearLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:gravity="center" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="8dp">
<androidx.cardview.widget.CardView android:id="@+id/cardFlashcard" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="0dp" android:layout_weight="1" app:cardBackgroundColor="@color/card_bg" app:cardCornerRadius="20dp" app:cardElevation="6dp">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:gravity="center" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="28dp">
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvQuestionTitle" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginBottom="8dp" android:text="Question" android:textColor="@color/text_secondary" android:textSize="14sp" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvQuestion" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:gravity="center" android:text="Flashcard question" android:textColor="@color/text_main" android:lineSpacingExtra="4dp" android:textSize="22sp" android:textStyle="bold" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvTapHint" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="18dp" android:text="Tap to reveal answer " android:textColor="@color/primary" android:textSize="15sp" android:textStyle="bold" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvAnswer" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="18dp" android:gravity="center" android:text="Flashcard answer" android:textColor="@color/text_main" android:lineSpacingExtra="3dp" android:textSize="17sp" android:visibility="gone" /> </LinearLayout> </androidx.cardview.widget.CardView>
<LinearLayout android:id="@+id/layoutDifficulty" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="12dp" android:gravity="center" android:orientation="horizontal" android:visibility="gone">
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnEasy" style="@style/Widget.Material3.Button.OutlinedButton" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginEnd="6dp" android:layout_weight="1" android:text="Easy" />
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnMedium" style="@style/Widget.Material3.Button.OutlinedButton" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginHorizontal="6dp" android:layout_weight="1" android:text="Medium" />
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnHard" style="@style/Widget.Material3.Button.OutlinedButton" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginStart="6dp" android:layout_weight="1" android:text="Hard" /> </LinearLayout>
</LinearLayout>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <LinearLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:gravity="center" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="8dp">
<androidx.cardview.widget.CardView android:id="@+id/cardFlashcard" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="0dp" android:layout_weight="1" app:cardBackgroundColor="@color/card_bg" app:cardCornerRadius="20dp" app:cardElevation="6dp">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:gravity="center" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="28dp">
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvQuestionTitle" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginBottom="8dp" android:text="Question" android:textColor="@color/text_secondary" android:textSize="14sp" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvQuestion" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:gravity="center" android:text="Flashcard question" android:textColor="@color/text_main" android:lineSpacingExtra="4dp" android:textSize="22sp" android:textStyle="bold" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvTapHint" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="18dp" android:text="Tap to flip card " android:textColor="@color/primary" android:textSize="15sp" android:textStyle="bold" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvThinkPrompt" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="10dp" android:gravity="center" android:text=" Try to answer before revealing" android:textColor="@color/text_secondary" android:textSize="14sp" android:visibility="gone" />
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnShowAnswer" style="@style/Widget.Material3.Button.OutlinedButton" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="16dp" android:text="Show Answer" android:visibility="gone" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvAnswer" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="18dp" android:gravity="center" android:text="Flashcard answer" android:textColor="@color/text_main" android:lineSpacingExtra="3dp" android:textSize="17sp" android:visibility="gone" /> </LinearLayout> </androidx.cardview.widget.CardView>
<LinearLayout android:id="@+id/layoutDifficulty" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="12dp" android:gravity="center" android:orientation="horizontal" android:visibility="gone">
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnEasy" style="@style/Widget.Material3.Button.OutlinedButton" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginEnd="6dp" android:layout_weight="1" android:text=" I knew this" />
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnMedium" style="@style/Widget.Material3.Button.OutlinedButton" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginHorizontal="6dp" android:layout_weight="1" android:text=" Almost" />
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnHard" style="@style/Widget.Material3.Button.OutlinedButton" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginStart="6dp" android:layout_weight="1" android:text=" Didn’t know" /> </LinearLayout>
</LinearLayout>
